meaning: n.缎子,假缎,缎纹adj.绸缎做的,缎子一般的,光滑(似缎)的
examples: The blankets were bound with satin.
The final stage of waxing left it with a satin sheen.
She had tied back her hair with a peach satin ribbon.
And scratchy blackout curtains shut out light from sash windows once framed by shimmering amber satin.
The full skirt was framed by a band of silk duchess satin and a subtle train.
